changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO qual_metrics (id, name, description, risk_model_id, ordinal, created_by_id, updated_by_id) VALUES (101, 'Likelihood', 'Probability an attack will cause damage.', 101, 1, 161, 161) , (102, 'Impact', 'The extent an attack will cause damage.', 101, 2, 161, 161) , (103, 'Amplified Reputation', 'The increase in risk based on reputational factors.', 101, 3, 161, 161) , (104, 'Amplified Operational', 'The increase in risk based on operational factors.', 101, 4, 161, 161) , (105, 'Amplified Legal', 'The increase in risk based on legal factors.', 101, 5, 161, 161) ;
ALTER SEQUENCE qual_metrics_id_seq RESTART WITH 108;
